prompt_text:
### Demographics: 44-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~3.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 112.1 kg; Height 181.8 cm; BMI 33.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.5%; 9 months ago 6.6%; 6 months ago 7.0%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 183mg/dL; 3 months ago 201mg/dL; current 225mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 111.8kg; 9 months ago 113.3kg; 6 months ago 109.9kg; 3 months ago 110.8kg; current 112.1kg), Height (12 months ago 181.8cm; 9 months ago 181.8cm; 6 months ago 181.8cm; 3 months ago 181.8cm; current 181.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 33.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 31U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 35mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 175mg/g; 9 months ago 171mg/g; 6 months ago 231mg/g; 3 months ago 220mg/g; current 265mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 107mg/dL; 9 months ago 106mg/dL; 6 months ago 124mg/dL; 3 months ago 123mg/dL; current 117mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
